title: deer-flow.sandbox.result v1
description: Verdict-level signals from deer-flow sandbox execution. Emitted after each sandbox case execution with the result verdict, latency, and output. Source: /deer-flow/sandbox.

id.description: ULID — unique identifier for this event

source.description: Source URI — always /deer-flow/sandbox for this channel

datacontenttype.description: Content type of the data field

time.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the result was recorded

case_id.description: Unique identifier for the sandbox case. Use 'bash' for direct bash executions, or extract from tool context

verdict.description: Execution verdict: CE=Compilation Error, RE=Runtime Error, TLE=Time Limit Exceeded, MLE=Memory Limit Exceeded, WA=Wrong Answer, OK=Correct

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock latency in milliseconds for this case

exit_code.description: Process exit code returned by the sandbox execution

stderr.description: Standard error output from the execution (truncated to 500 chars)

stdout.description: Standard output from the execution (truncated to 1000 chars)
